title: Regularly schedule reports from board
excerpt:
I need the ability to tell Monday to export specific columns from a board (or the whole board) every month & to email it to a specific email address.

posts.author: puck4007 (Donna)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need the ability to tell Monday to export specific columns from a board (or the whole board) every month & to email it to a specific email address.

I need to clarify that I work for a large Enterprise customer who has security very tightly controlled. They do not allow us to install any of the third-party apps. We can only utilize functionality in the core Monday.com product. So, if there’s an app available that can do this, that won’t be of use.

Also - a dashboard isn’t the answer. The report needs to go to non-Monday.com users who want a detailed Excel spreadsheet.

I’d like to put in a feature request to have this added as core functionality. I need to be able to set up an automation that says: Every 1st day of the month at 8:00AM, export and email to: xyz@someemail.com"

posts.author: andrew.marshall (Andrew Marshall)
posts.cookedHtml: @puck4007 I attended Elevate in NYC this year and they said this was possible now for Enterprise users. I can’t figure it out those. We want it as well
